name: lx-0-public-plugins
description: lx-0's PUBLIC plugin catalog for Claude Code and Cursor.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Cross-project bridge to a locally-installed LLM-wiki. Read your compiled knowledge from any project, diagnose pipeline health, contribute back (capture, ingest, hard facts), run maintenance, or report engine bugs upstream. Ships the use-llm-wiki skill; the wiki CLI itself comes from the llm-wiki engine.

plugins.name: sunoflow
plugins.description: AI music creation and management via the SunoFlow MCP server. Song generation, lyrics, sound effects, playlist management, stem separation, music videos, audio exports. Connects to a self-hosted or hosted SunoFlow instance over MCP stdio transport.
